programs.title: Keeping Up With The Kardashians
programs.desc: Khloe and Tristan return to LA with baby True, but Kim and Tristan have unresolved tension over his infidelity. While Kourtney travels to DC to speak in front of Congress.

programs.title: Botched
programs.desc: Dr. Nassif and Dr. Dubrow salute service members who have fallen victim to surgical disasters & the doctors help a Black Hawk crew chief who was missing her left breast.

programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.desc: A tough start in Santa Ana leads to a long day as the buyers hit a second auction in Hawaiian Gardens in hopes of finding a great locker.

programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.desc: An auction in Los Angeles brings more buyers than Dan and Laura bargained for. Dave Hester returns to the auctions despite his troublesome past.

programs.title: Hoarders
programs.desc: An appreciation for the finer things gave Forrest a drive to acquire an excess of unique items that overtook his home inside and out. He is now facing financial pressure from by receiving daily fines.

programs.title: 24 Hours In Emergency
programs.desc: 70-year-old Jenny is rushed into the emergency department with left sided weakness and problems with her speech, whilst 81-year-old Brian has facial droop and spinal tingling.
